user.title: Connect to HA AI
user.description: Please enter the API key(s) required for the corresponding service. For all services, please enter all API keys. If you have any questions, you can click the question mark icon to view the help documentation.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to HA AI service
error.invalid_model_catalog: Model catalog must be valid JSON. Use a list of strings, a list of {"id":"...","note":"..."}, or an object map.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured

init.title: Configuration Options
init.description: Manage reusable provider API keys, proactive follow-up, and habit learning. Detailed model/provider settings are still configured on each subentry.

data_description.api_keys: Reusable API keys as JSON, for example {"openai":"sk-...","aliyun":"..."}
data_description.follow_up_enabled: Create short-lived pending contexts when HA AI asks a clarification question.
data_description.follow_up_timeout_seconds: How long a pending clarification can wait for playback_done or a user reply.
data_description.follow_up_max_attempts: How many automatic listen attempts a pending clarification may request.
data_description.habit_learning_enabled: Observe configured service calls and build habit candidates. It will not create automations without later confirmation.
data_description.habit_min_observations: Minimum observations before a habit candidate is considered useful.
data_description.habit_confidence_threshold: Confidence threshold used by future suggestion logic.
data_description.habit_temperature_sensors: Comma-separated temperature sensors to snapshot when a habit event is recorded.
data_description.habit_presence_entities: Comma-separated person/binary_sensor entities to snapshot when a habit event is recorded.
data_description.habit_action_domains: Comma-separated service domains to observe, such as climate,light,switch,fan.

abort.configure_via_subentries: Please configure conversation and AI task through subentries. Find the corresponding subentries in the devices page.

init.title: Configure Conversation Agent
init.description: Configure the conversation agent. All advanced options are shown so you can use any OpenAI-compatible provider.

data_description.provider_preset: Choose a template to prefill provider key, URL, and model fields. Select Custom to edit freely.
data_description.chat_model: Select or enter custom model name
data_description.model_catalog: Editable JSON list of models. Use id and note fields to add pricing, status, or other remarks.
data_description.chat_url: Complete chat API URL (if API fails, try appending /chat/completions)
data_description.llm_provider: Select which chat model API provider to use
data_description.provider_key: Name to look up in the top-level Provider API Keys JSON, for example openai or siliconflow
data_description.custom_api_key: Custom API key for this subentry. Overrides provider key and legacy main key.
data_description.max_history_messages: Number of history messages to keep
data_description.long_memory_update_turns: Update long-term memory every N conversation turns
data_description.long_memory_max_chars: Maximum length of long-term memory summary
data_description.long_memory_pinned: Pinned facts or preferences that should always be remembered
data_description.long_memory_global: Editable global long-term memory summary extracted automatically from past conversations
data_description.long_memory_conversation: Editable recent memory summary extracted automatically from recent conversations

init.title: Configure AI Task
init.description: Configure AI task behavior and image generation. Chat model follows the Conversation Agent settings.

data_description.provider_preset: Choose a template to prefill provider key, URL, and model fields. Select Custom to edit freely.
data_description.image_model: Select or enter custom image generation model
data_description.model_catalog: Editable JSON list of image models with optional notes such as price or availability.
data_description.provider_key: Name to look up in the top-level Provider API Keys JSON
data_description.custom_api_key: Custom API key for this subentry

init.title: Configure TTS Voice
init.description: Configure text-to-speech. Edge TTS remains available as a free option; other providers can use an OpenAI-compatible HTTP speech endpoint.

data_description.provider_preset: Choose a template. Aliyun Bailian uses a serialized realtime session when configured with a wss:// URL.
data_description.tts_provider: Use edge_tts for free Edge TTS, or openai_compatible_tts for HTTP speech APIs
data_description.tts_model: Provider model name, for example tts-1 or qwen-tts
data_description.provider_key: Name to look up in the top-level Provider API Keys JSON
data_description.custom_api_key: Custom API key for this TTS subentry
data_description.voice: Select Edge TTS voice, like Xiaoxiao, Yunxi, etc.
data_description.lang: Select voice language, like zh-CN for Chinese

init.title: Configure STT
init.description: Configure speech-to-text with an OpenAI-compatible transcription endpoint.

data_description.provider_preset: Choose a template to prefill provider key, URL, and model fields. Select Custom to edit freely.
data_description.stt_provider: Provider identifier, editable for future providers
data_description.model: Select or enter a speech recognition model
data_description.model_catalog: Editable JSON list of STT models with optional notes
data_description.provider_key: Name to look up in the top-level Provider API Keys JSON
data_description.custom_api_key: Custom API key for this STT subentry

generate_image.name: Generate Image
generate_image.description: Generate image using the configured HA AI image provider

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.description: Describe the image content to generate

analyze_image.name: Analyze Image
analyze_image.description: Analyze image content using HA AI

image_file.name: Image File
image_file.description: Path to the image file to analyze

message.name: Analysis Prompt
message.description: Tell AI how to analyze this image

tts_say.name: TTS Speech Synthesis
tts_say.description: Convert text to speech using the configured TTS provider

text.name: Text
text.description: Text content to convert to speech

voice.name: Voice
voice.description: Voice name for the configured provider

media_player_entity.name: Media Player
media_player_entity.description: Media player entity to play speech

stt_transcribe.name: STT Transcription
stt_transcribe.description: Convert speech to text using the configured STT provider

file.name: Audio File
file.description: Path to audio file to transcribe (supports mp3, wav, flac formats)
